cases.name: happy_path_dual_scurve_horizons_scenarios
cases.prompt: Run the analyze-trajectory skill on us-ambient-scribe-medtech for the 2026-2031 horizon. Use the G3 sub-segments from working/market-sizing.md if present, otherwise use ambulatory-primary-care, inpatient-acute, specialty-surgical.

cases.name: rejects_missing_scenarios
cases.prompt: Run analyze-trajectory on a synthetic industry where the dual S-curve, Three Horizons, discontinuities, and Power Progression are all present but the scenarios section is omitted.

cases.name: rejects_all_stable_trajectory
cases.prompt: Run analyze-trajectory on a synthetic industry where the drafter claims everything is stable: market S-curve and tech S-curve both 'maturity, no change', no discontinuities named, no scenarios with swing variables. No industry is fully stable over 5yr.

cases.name: rejects_vague_timing
cases.prompt: Run analyze-trajectory on a synthetic industry where discontinuities are listed but timing windows are vague ('AI will disrupt this industry soon', 'regulatory change coming eventually').

cases.name: rejects_single_scurve
cases.prompt: Run analyze-trajectory on a synthetic industry where only the market S-curve is assessed and the technology S-curve is omitted.

cases.name: warns_hyper_cycle_without_cycle_methodology
cases.prompt: Run analyze-trajectory on defi-us for the 2026-2031 horizon without disclosing cycle methodology (no cycle period, no peak-to-trough amplitude, no sentiment driver). All standard S-curve / Three Horizons / Power / scenario sections present.

cases.name: rejects_orchestrator_mode_qualitative_scenarios
cases.prompt: Run analyze-trajectory in orchestrator mode on a synthetic industry where 08-knowledge/world-model/industries/<slug>/working/market-sizing.md exists, but the scenarios section contains only qualitative narration (no dollar figures, no CAGR percentages).

cases.name: standalone_qualitative_scenarios_pass_with_warning
cases.prompt: Run analyze-trajectory in standalone mode (no working/market-sizing.md sibling) on a synthetic industry where scenarios are qualitative — named swing variables but no dollar figures or CAGR percentages.

cases.name: negative_trigger_company_moat_request
cases.prompt: Assess the moat of Abridge specifically — which of the 7 Powers do they have?
